title: Replace 'Short-Time' with 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' section

requirements.text: Replace all occurrences of the job type label 'Short-Time' with 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' across the entire frontend, including job type badges, filter dropdowns, selection options, and any display text where 'Short-Time' appears as a job category or section label.
acceptanceCriteria: The label 'Short-Time' no longer appears anywhere in the UI.

The label 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' appears in all places where 'Short-Time' previously appeared, including job type badges on LandingPage.tsx, filter dropdowns in JobFilters.tsx, and type selectors in JobPostingForm.tsx.
Job listings previously categorized as 'Short-Time' now display as 'NYSC (Youth Corps)'.
The visual styling and layout of the replaced label matches the style of the other job type labels (e.g., Artisan).

requirements.text: Update the backend job type enum or variant in main.mo to rename the 'ShortTime' (or equivalent) variant to 'NYSC' (or 'YouthCorps'), ensuring all related backend functions, filters, and data handling reflect the new type name.
acceptanceCriteria: The backend no longer defines or accepts a 'ShortTime' job type variant.
A new 'NYSC' (or equivalent) job type variant is defined and accepted by the backend.
All backend query and filter functions that previously handled 'ShortTime' correctly handle the new 'NYSC' type.
The frontend's job type value sent to and received from the backend matches the updated backend variant name.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Preserve all other existing job type categories (e.g., Artisan, Full-Time, Part-Time) unchanged.
nonGoals: Adding any new job type categories beyond renaming Short-Time to NYSC (Youth Corps).
Changing the visual design or layout of the job type section.
Migrating or transforming existing job listing data stored in the backend canister.
